summary: V2 Categories API testing completed successfully. All 16 features tested - Backend: 12/12 tests pass (100%), Frontend: All UI flows verified working. The V2 system with subcategories, smart pricing, and kits is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: V2 API correctly implements subcategory hierarchy (7 categories × 4 subcategories = 28 total)
Smart pricing correctly returns suggested_prices[business_type] or default_price
Kit expansion correctly calculates total_ht from expanded_items
ServiceItemSelectorV2 component properly integrates with V2 API endpoints
Backward compatibility maintained - V1 endpoints (/api/categories, /api/categories/with-items) still work
seed_data_creation: V2 data seeded via POST /api/v2/categories/seed?force=true - 7 categories, 28 subcategories, 140 items, 8 kits
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 category system fully tested. Rate limiting is strict (5 logins/minute) - wait between test runs. Admin user has business_type='general' so sees all categories and general prices. Smart pricing returns suggested_prices[user.business_type] if available, otherwise default_price.

V2 API: GET /api/v2/categories returns c.details: Returns 7 categories for general user: Électricité, Réseaux & Courants Faibles, Plomberie, Maçonnerie, Peinture, Menuiserie, Rénovation générale

V2 API: GET /api/v2/categories/with-subc.details: Returns 7 categories each with 4 subcategories (28 total). Structure: {id, name, business_types, icon, subcategories[]}

V2 API: GET /api/v2/categories/{id}/subc.details: Tested with Électricité - returns 4 subcategories: Installation, Rénovation, Dépannage, Mise aux normes

V2 API: GET /api/v2/subcategories/{id}/i.details: Returns 5 items for Électricité>Installation with smart_price field. Example: Installation prise électrique has default_price=65, electrician=55, general=70, smart_price=70 for general user

V2 API: GET /api/v2/kits returns kits fi.details: Returns 8 kits for general user with business_type badges (electrician, plumber, mason, painter, it_installer, general)

V2 API: GET /api/v2/kits/{id} returns ki.details: Kit 'Installation électrique appartement T3' returns 7 expanded_items with id, name, description, unit, quantity, unit_price, total. total_ht correctly calculated

Frontend: Invoice form shows new Service.details: Component visible with title 'Ajouter un article prédéfini', category/subcategory/article dropdowns, and 'Ajouter un kit' button

Frontend: Category dropdown shows all 7.details: Dropdown shows: Maçonnerie, Menuiserie, Peinture, Plomberie, Rénovation générale, Réseaux & Courants Faibles, Électricité

Frontend: Subcategory dropdown populates.details: After selecting Électricité, subcategory dropdown shows: Installation, Rénovation, Dépannage, Mise aux normes

Frontend: Article dropdown shows items w.details: After selecting Installation, article dropdown shows 5 items with prices: Installation interrupteur (60€/unité), Installation prise électrique (70€/unité), etc.

Frontend: 'Ajouter un kit' button opens.details: Dialog opens with title 'Ajouter un kit prédéfini' and list of 8 kits

Frontend: Kit dialog shows all available.details: 8 kits displayed with business_type badges (mason, plumber, it_installer, etc.)

Frontend: Selecting a kit shows expanded.details: Kit details panel shows expanded items with quantities and prices, plus total_ht

Frontend: Adding a kit inserts all kit i.details: Kit 'Installation électrique appartement T3' added 7 items to invoice with correct quantities and prices

Smart pricing: Items show different pric.details: Verified: Installation prise électrique shows 70€ for general user (suggested_prices.general=70), would show 55€ for electrician

Backward compatibility: Old /api/categor.details: GET /api/categories and GET /api/categories/with-items both return 200 OK with valid data

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All V2 features working as expected.
